title: Workday Journal Entry
description: A journal entry records financial transactions in the general ledger, consisting of balanced debit and credit lines posted to specific ledger accounts within a Workday Financial Management system.

id.description: Workday ID (WID) uniquely identifying the journal entry

description.description: Descriptive memo for the journal entry

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the journal entry

journalSource.description: Source system or process that created the journal entry

company.description: Company entity associated with the journal entry

accountingPeriod.description: Accounting period for the journal entry

totalDebit.description: Total debit amount across all lines

totalCredit.description: Total credit amount across all lines

lines.description: Individual journal entry lines (minimum two required for balanced entry)

createdBy.description: Worker who created the journal entry

createdOn.description: Timestamp when the journal entry was created

JournalLine.description: An individual line within a journal entry representing a debit or credit to a ledger account

costCenter.description: Cost center allocation for this line

Reference.description: A reference to a related Workday resource

id.description: Workday ID (WID) of the referenced resource

descriptor.description: Display name of the referenced resource
